nameEn: Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing
description: Alongside ACL, one of the two top-tier NLP conferences, emphasizing empirical methods in natural language processing. It highlights large-scale experiments and data-driven research, and has achieved near-equal prestige with ACL in recent years. Held annually in autumn, it complements ACL's timing.

bestPapers.paperTitle: Visually Grounded Reasoning across Languages and Cultures
bestPapers.authors: Fangyu Liu, Emanuele Bugliarello, Edoardo Maria Ponti, Siva Reddy, Nigel Collier, Desmond Elliott

bestPapers.paperTitle: Abstract Visual Reasoning with Tangram Shapes
Ignore This Title and HackAPrompt: Exposing Systemic Vulnerabilities of LLMs Through a Global Prompt Hacking Competition
bestPapers.authors: Schulhoff, Pinto, Khan, Bouchard, Si et al.

bestPapers.paperTitle: Label Words are Anchors: An Information Flow Perspective for Understanding In-Context Learning
bestPapers.authors: Wang, Li, Dai, Chen, Zhou, Meng, Zhou, Sun

bestPapers.paperTitle: An Image Speaks a Thousand Words, but Can Everyone Listen? On Image Transcreation for Cultural Relevance
Backward Lens: Projecting Language Model Gradients into the Vocabulary Space
CoGen: Learning from Feedback with Coupled Comprehension and Generation
Pretraining Data Detection for Large Language Models: A Divergence-based Calibration Method
bestPapers.authors: Zhang, Zhang, Guo, de Rijke, Fan, Cheng

bestPapers.paperTitle: Towards Robust Speech Representation Learning for Thousands of Languages
bestPapers.authors: Chen, Zhang, Peng, Li, Tian, Shi, Chang, Maiti, Livescu, Watanabe

bestPapers.paperTitle: Infini-gram mini: Exact n-gram Search at the Internet Scale with FM-Index

descriptionKo: ACL과 함께 NLP 분야 양대 탑티어 학회로, 경험적 방법론에 기반한 자연어처리 연구를 중심으로 다룬다. 대규모 실험과 데이터 기반 연구가 강조되며, 최근에는 ACL과 거의 동급의 위상을 가진다. 매년 가을에 개최되어 ACL과 시기적으로 보완적이다.
descriptionEn: Alongside ACL, one of the two top-tier NLP conferences, emphasizing empirical methods in natural language processing. It highlights large-scale experiments and data-driven research, and has achieved near-equal prestige with ACL in recent years. Held annually in autumn, it complements ACL's timing.
